reviews.review_description: I like the idea of VR Arkanoid, but I feel like the execution could've been better. You basically only just use one arm and it can become pretty boring after a while, despite the power-ups and special bricks. I won't refund it tho, it's a good app to show my friends VR.

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for your support. I’ll do my best to add more interesting features and improve the experience.

If you’re willing, I’d really appreciate hearing your ideas as well. Feel free to email me at service@wewe.ws

reviews.review_description: Update: After the developer's helpful reply, the game is now working for me. I don't know what the problem was before. It's really fun in VR. I used to enjoy playing games like this on my phone. Highly recommended, especially for the low price.

developer_response.body: I’m so glad you enjoyed the game! Thank you for playing. If you have any suggestions or questions, I’m all ears.

reviews.review_description: An amazing example of addictive and challenging game. I like everything about it, from music, graphics to the gameplay. Well done.

developer_response.body: I'm really grateful you played the game! So happy to hear you loved it.

reviews.review_description:
Brick Smash VR perfectly recreates one of my favorite childhood games brick breaker. It doesn’t just stop at bringing back the classic; it enhances the experience with new elements that breathe fresh life into the genre.

Combining the charm of a retro game with the immersive power of modern VR technology, it delivers an unforgettable experience. The countless stages keep me hooked and make it nearly impossible to put the game down.

That’s it for my review now, if you’ll excuse me, I’m heading back into Brick Smash VR.

developer_response.body: Thank you for trying out the game! I'm glad you loved it. If you have any questions or suggestions, feel free to let me know.

reviews.review_title: A perfect mix of nostalgia and VR
reviews.review_description:
I'm old enough to have experienced the original brick breaker games, like Arkanood, and Brick smash, feels like a perfect mash up of those retro games with a modern twist, all in Virtual Reality.

The core gameplay will feel familiar, knock a ball back and forth across the screen to destroy blocks to complete the level.
We've seen games I trldhxe powerups and the addition of a pistol you can use to shoot blocks works well... 

But the real highlight is the overall layout of the levels, each group of stages has a fresh layout, with obstacles, and bumpers which will make things a little more difficult and unpredictable.

Theres also a choice of controls between motion or the stick, and 3 different views which can be swapped mid-play.

There's a couple of areas I'd like to see improved to make control even easier , but it's already a very enjoyable game thats easy to recommend.

developer_response.body: Thank you for trying out the game! I'm glad you loved it. If you have any questions or suggestions, feel free to let me know.

reviews.review_title: Inexpensive fun.  Will a spinner work?
reviews.review_description:
I play Arkanoid and Tempest with a USB C arcade spinner.  

This VR experience is nothing like those games.

You flick your wrist and the paddle moves.  A button flips the table and enables a bullet time mode.

It's pretty cool once you get use to it.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for trying out the game! I'm thrilled that you enjoyed it. 

I haven't used a USB-C arcade spinner before, but I looked up some information about it—pretty cool stuff! It reminds me of the dedicated peripherals for arcade brick-breaking games from my childhood.  :)

reviews.review_description: If you like Arkanoid or Breakout you will love this. Has a bunch of new wrinkles with some of the classic power ups like multi shot. The only minor complaint is the menus can be a bit laggy but the gameplay is smooth.

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing the game! I’m really glad you enjoyed it. Improved resolution and smoother gameplay, with clear and sharp visuals and refined performance, are things I care deeply about and will strive to perfect. The menus being a bit laggy likely happens during level loading, as it fetches all the leaderboard scores. I’ll do my best to optimize it. Thanks again!

reviews.review_description: This is a great old school to the new school game with great graphics but I hope that Developers put an option rate if you want to be inside of the game itself in which you could see the whole view

developer_response.body:
I'm very glad that you enjoy my game! I'm very interested in your suggestion and would love to learn more. If you have time, please email me at service@wewe.ws so we can discuss it further. Thanks again for your support!
Edit: In v1.0.3, I've added a new game perspective, allowing you to see the whole view. Now, there are a total of three different perspectives you can switch between anytime! I hope you like it!

reviews.review_title: I hate the physics in this game
reviews.review_description: I really dont like how the physics is implemented in this game. I played for a while then i gave up. The way that ball is moving around is very different from what i played on PC. I dont like it.

developer_response.body: The physics in the game are based on those of most brickout-style games. In addition to the classic rectangular stages, I’ve also added polygonal stages, rotating obstacles, and blocks with different behaviors, creating more variation in the ball’s movement. If this type of physics isn't to your liking, I’m truly sorry that I couldn’t meet your preferences. You're also welcome to request a refund if you'd like—no hard feelings. Thanks again for your feedback.

reviews.review_description: This is a great game for fans of Arkanoid and BlockOut - addictive, and I really love the translucent floating triangles and other objects that float between you and the game at times.  Great fun, and levels for all skills - overall great game.  (-:

developer_response.body: I’m glad you had a good time with the game! Thanks for playing.

reviews.review_description: Fantastic game, loads of fun chasing high scores!

developer_response.body: I appreciate you trying out the game! It’s great to hear you enjoyed it.

reviews.review_description: Who can resist a classic? As the solo developer of Brick Smash VR, I naturally have to give it a solid 5-star rating. I can confidently say that no other game native to Quest 2 or Quest 3 offers features like Passthrough Mode, real-time camera viewport adjustment, and optimized performance with sharper visuals and refined gameplay, ensuring a smoother and more immersive experience. I’m very proud of it and hope you all enjoy it!
If you liked Arkanoid, this is a must buy. It is as fun as the classic and with VR it becomes even better! The powerups and visual-effects are well done. 5 stars!

developer_response.body: I'm really pleased you liked the game! Thanks for trying it out.

reviews.review_title: Must Buy - Brick Smash VR Recommended
reviews.review_description:
Brick Smash VR is an outstanding blend of classic brick-breaking fun and immersive VR gameplay that shines with simplicity and engaging mechanics. The game takes the nostalgic arcade experience to a whole new level by putting you directly in the action, allowing you to swing at bricks, dodge obstacles, and react to surprises in real-time.

With vibrant, neon-inspired visuals and satisfying sound effects, Brick Smash VR captures the heart of arcade gaming while adding a modern, immersive twist. The intuitive controls are perfect for all ages and skill levels, making it accessible for VR newcomers and veterans alike. The game does a fantastic job balancing simplicity with challenge, adding power-ups and varied brick patterns to keep gameplay fresh and exciting.

While the focus is on classic brick-smashing action, Brick Smash VR offers enough variety to keep players hooked, especially in shorter play sessions. This game is ideal for anyone looking to relax and enjoy some nostalgic fun in a VR setting without the need for complex mechanics or steep learning curves.

In short, Brick Smash VR is a must-play for VR fans and arcade lovers, merging old-school excitement with modern VR immersion for a uniquely enjoyable experience.

developer_response.body: I'm so glad you enjoyed the game! Thank you so much for your review – you really captured the heart of the game. It’s fairly simple to play, making it easy to jump right in and have fun. If you have any suggestions or questions, I’m all ears.

reviews.review_description:
Brick Smash VR is so much fun and very addictive, it’s one of them games that always draws you back! 

This retro game in VR is awesome controlling the paddle with your left or right controller to direct the ball to the bricks, collect power ups to get fire balls or even get a gun with limited billets to take out the bricks faster and better your speed score. 

Even change the view to a kind of pinball effect style by hitting your “B” button. 

You can play In pass through or VR 

Global leaderboards for the competitive gamer. 

Just a delightful game you can kick back in and have a blast. 

Great job well done!

developer_response.body: I’m really happy you loved the game! Thanks for playing. If you have any suggestions or questions, I’d love to hear them.

reviews.review_description:
This game takes me back to the old days playing pc games
I love it 
It's quite a different experience in vr and it's highly addictive

developer_response.body: Thank you for trying out the game! I'm glad you loved it.

reviews.review_description:
Great game. 
If you like classic Arkanoid games then this title is for you. 
Very Addictive game

developer_response.body: I’m really happy you loved the game! Thanks for playing. If you have any suggestions or questions, I’d love to hear them.

reviews.review_description: I played for 30 minutes and couldn’t stop! It’s amazing. If you like Bricks Breaker games on mobile, this is the best choice for VR. I suggest the developers add more exciting and varied levels upfront, and include more dynamic elements in the early stages. Also, I need more and more thrilling visual effects. It's awesome, and I can't wait to see what happens with this game in the future!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback! I’ve received your requests, and I’ll do my best to improve the game. I’ll work on adding more dynamic elements and richer visual effects in the early levels to enhance the experience.
Thank you for playing! I'm delighted that you enjoyed it.

reviews.review_description: I have enjoyed playing this game, lots of levels and different choice of power ups. The leaderboards  are interesting and I found myself trying to beat my score and push myself up the rankings each time I have played. Worthy addition to your library.

developer_response.body: I’m really happy you loved the game! Thanks for playing. If you have any suggestions or questions, I’d love to hear them.

reviews.review_description: It’s an amazing game You can lose time playing this game which is awesome 🤩 not hard to learn to play .. At first wasn’t sure on it to be honest but I like it it’s worth the try I’d say ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

developer_response.body: I’m so happy you enjoyed the game! Thanks for giving it a go. If you have any feedback or questions, don’t hesitate to reach out.

reviews.review_description: "Brick Smash VR" exceeded my expectations! The gameplay is smooth, the visuals are sharp, and the ability to choose between a left-hand or right-hand controller is a fantastic addition. The levels are challenging without being overwhelming, and the game is perfect for both new and experienced VR players. For its price, it's an incredible deal and a must-have for brick-breaker fans!

developer_response.body: I’m really happy you loved the game! Thanks for playing. If you have any suggestions or questions, I’d love to hear them.

reviews.review_description: This is Retro dipped in Modern, trying to beat those scores on the boards is so addicting, it plays fantastic. You can catch my full review on Youtube, just search for Gotcha VR.

developer_response.body: I’m really happy you loved the game! Thanks for playing. If you have any suggestions or questions, I’d love to hear them.

reviews.review_description:
A modernized version of a classic game. I’m enjoying the play a lot.

It’s a great game while sitting and doesn’t require a lot of space for your arm movements, so you can play it almost anywhere.

developer_response.body: I’m thrilled you enjoyed the game! Thank you for playing. If you have any questions or ideas, feel free to let me know.

reviews.review_description: Very relaxing and comfortable game to play.

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing the game! I’m really glad you had fun. Feel free to share any questions or feedback you might have.

reviews.review_description: Brick Smash VR is a delightful throwback that perfectly captures the essence of classic arcade gaming while adding a fresh spin. The game merges the addictive mechanics of brick breaker with engaging pinball-like bounce effects, making it both fun and accessible. Its straightforward controls ensure that players can dive right in without feeling overwhelmed, allowing for hours of enjoyable gameplay. This VR experience is a brilliant homage to timeless favorites, enhanced by modern technology. If you’re a fan of classic games, Brick Smash VR is an absolute must-try that will rekindle your love for arcade adventures. Check out my video on my YT channel @misschiefvr

developer_response.body: Thank you for checking out the game! I’m so glad you had a great time.

reviews.review_description:
"Brick Smash VR" absolutely brought back my childhood memories. As soon as I entered the game, I was captivated by its immersive experience. Wearing the VR headset, I felt like I was in a world filled with bricks. With precise controls, every time I hit a brick, I could hear a crisp sound that fascinated me. This high level of immersion made me completely forget the real world, allowing me to fully indulge in the joy of brick-breaking.

When I first played the game, it gave me a sense of relaxation. However, after the update, the new music and effects excited me, making me want to continuously challenge more levels. Whether I was lying in bed using the mixed reality mode or fully immersed in the virtual reality mode, I enjoyed different kinds of fun.

If you enjoy brick-breaking games and are interested in virtual reality, then "Brick Smash VR" is definitely a game you shouldn't miss.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We will continue to upgrade the content to make the game more enjoyable.

reviews.review_description: It makes me think of the retro game “Arkanoid”. Such good old days! This game is very suitable for VR new hand. Because there’s no locomotion and smooth turning, players just need to stand or sit there, and just play it! Even my grandma loves this game.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your wonderful review! We're thrilled to hear that you enjoyed Brick Smash VR.

reviews.review_description:
I wasn't sure if I would really enjoy this title, but once I launched it, I was hooked. 

The controls are very intuitive and the levels offer a fair amount of difficulty. 

The leaderboards show at the end of every level, so even though I am normally not that competitive, I found myself trying to clear levels faster to see my name on the scoreboard.

developer_response.body: I’m really happy you loved the game! Thanks for playing.

reviews.review_description:
Brick Smash is a total blast and totally addictive! It takes the classic brick-breaking concept and dials it up to eleven with vibrant graphics, smooth controls, and a dynamic, fast-paced gameplay style that keeps you coming back for more.
The game’s design is brilliantly simple yet endlessly challenging. Each level introduces new types of bricks, power-ups, and obstacles that keep the action fresh and exciting. 
The audio and visual effects are great, designed with the original game in mind, with a retro-inspired soundtrack that pairs perfectly with the arcade-style gameplay. The controls are responsive and intuitive, making it easy for players of all skill levels to jump in and start smashing bricks.
Overall, it's pure fun and a great way to unwind or challenge yourself  whether you’re a casual gamer or a hardcore gamer. Highly recommended!

developer_response.body: I’m glad you had a good time with the game! Thanks for playing.

reviews.review_description:
'I only started playing today but will certainly be playing again tomorrow!  I am less active than I used to be and so it is great finding a game that’s enjoyable sitting down.  It reminded me of many, many years ago when black & white images showed a block moving up and down while a small rectangle bounced from side to side.  That was my start into computer games!    We have come a long way since then!!
This is a great game and didn’t cost a lot.  It’s a good game for anyone new to VR as  comfortable introduction.

developer_response.body: Thanks for trying the game! I’m glad to hear you loved it.

reviews.review_description:
Traditional bat and ball game, like the golden oldies like Arkanoid.
Break the blocks to move on to the next level.
Sounds and graphics perfect for the type of game it is.

Various power ups to collect during game play that speed up the ball, split it into 3 ect…

Has great music to play along to, easy game to play for the whole family.

developer_response.body: I appreciate you trying out the game! It’s great to hear you enjoyed it. If you have any questions or feedback, don’t hesitate to reach out. :)

reviews.review_description:
I wasn’t sure what expect, from the minute you install it pops.
The graphics are stunning, so clear and sharp, some triple A games could learn from this dev.
Environments are really good, gameplay is on point, so reactive, the slider moves like a dream, I’m really impressed as the game is ridiculously cheap and so much fun, I wasn’t able to put it down.
I can tell the developer loves making this game, you can feel the passion.
Great work well done, definitely one for your collection.

developer_response.body: I’m really happy you loved the game! Thanks for playing.
